calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-11-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Douglas Holloway, Esq., for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corporation.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declaration, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Paul S. Suner Ind. and Dba. Suner Express.
Principal of $37,612.73
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Interest $1,712.86
Costs of $334.50
For the total of $42,160.09.
Judgment signed in open court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
